languages.text:
{g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} применяется если есть враги перед пастью
{g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Крик боли{/g} применяется если умирает Цветочек или порог хп понижается ниже 75% и 40%

traits.locale_text:
{g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} применяется если есть враги перед пастью
{g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Крик боли{/g} применяется если умирает Цветочек или порог хп понижается ниже 75% и 40%

languages.text: If there are enemies in front of the maw, it uses the {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} ability. When the flower is killed, or its {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced to less than 75% and 40%, the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used.
languages.original_text:
{g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} применяется если есть враги перед пастью
{g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Крик боли{/g} применяется если умирает Цветочек или порог хп понижается ниже 75% и 40%

traits.locale_text: If there are enemies in front of the maw, the {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} ability is used. When the flower is killed, or its wounds are reduced to less than 75% and 40%, the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used.

If there are enemies in front of the maw, it uses the {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} ability. When the flower is killed, or its {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced to less than 75% and 40%, the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used.

If there are enemies in front of the maw, it uses the {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} ability. When the flower is killed, or its wounds are reduced to less than 75% and 40%, the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used.

If there are enemies in front of the maw, it uses the {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} ability. When the flower is killed, or its {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced to less than 75% and 40%, the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used.

languages.text: Если перед пастью есть враги, она использует способность {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Ядовитое облако{/g}. В момент, когда {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g} цветка опускается до отметок 75% и 40%, а также при его уничтожении применяется способность {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Подавляющий визг{/g}.
languages.original_text: If there are enemies in front of the maw, it uses the {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} ability. When the flower is killed, or its {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced to less than 75% and 40%, the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used.

traits.locale_text: Если перед пастью есть враги, она использует способность {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Ядовитое облако{/g}. В момент, когда {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g} цветка опускается до отметок 75% и 40%, а также при его уничтожении применяется способность {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Подавляющий визг{/g}.

Если перед пастью есть враги, она использует способность {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Ядовитое облако{/g}. В момент, когда {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g} цветка опускается до отметок 75% и 40%, а также при его уничтожении применяется способность {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Подавляющий визг{/g}.

languages.text: S'il y a des ennemis devant la gueule, elle utilise la capacité {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Nuage empoisonné{/g}. Quand la fleur est tuée ou que ses {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} tombent sous les seuils de 75 % et 40 %, la capacité {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Hurlement oppressant{/g} est déclenchée.
languages.original_text: If there are enemies in front of the maw, it uses the {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} ability. When the flower is killed, or its {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced to less than 75% and 40%, the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used.

traits.locale_text: S'il y a des ennemis devant la gueule, elle utilise la capacité {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Nuage empoisonné{/g}. Quand la fleur est tuée ou que ses {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} tombent sous les seuils de 75 % et 40 %, la capacité {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Hurlement oppressant{/g} est déclenchée.

languages.text: Ağız, önünde düşmanlar varsa {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Zehirli Bulut{/g} kabiliyetini kullanır. Çiçek öldürüldüğünde veya {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanı %75 ve %40'ın altına indiğinde {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Boğucu Çığlık{/g} kabiliyeti kullanılır.
languages.original_text: If there are enemies in front of the maw, it uses the {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} ability. When the flower is killed, or its {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced to less than 75% and 40%, the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used.

traits.locale_text: Ağız, önünde düşmanlar varsa {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Zehirli Bulut{/g} kabiliyetini kullanır. Çiçek öldürüldüğünde veya {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanı %75 ve %40'ın altına indiğinde {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Boğucu Çığlık{/g} kabiliyeti kullanılır.

languages.text: 若其前方有敌人，巨口便会发动{g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}毒云{/g}能力。花朵一旦被杀，或{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}降至75%及40%以下，便会发动{g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}压迫尖啸{/g}能力。
languages.original_text: If there are enemies in front of the maw, it uses the {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} ability. When the flower is killed, or its {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced to less than 75% and 40%, the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used.

traits.locale_text: 若其前方有敌人，巨口便会发动{g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}毒云{/g}能力。花朵一旦被杀，或{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}降至75%及40%以下，便会发动{g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}压迫尖啸{/g}能力。

languages.text: Si tiene enemigos delante, las fauces utilizan la capacidad {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Nube venenosa{/g}. Cuando la flor es destruida o sus {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} se reducen a menos del 75 % y el 40 %, se utiliza la capacidad {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Chillido angustioso{/g}.
languages.original_text: If there are enemies in front of the maw, it uses the {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} ability. When the flower is killed, or its {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced to less than 75% and 40%, the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used.

traits.locale_text: Si tiene enemigos delante, las fauces utilizan la capacidad {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Nube venenosa{/g}. Cuando la flor es destruida o sus {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} se reducen a menos del 75 % y el 40 %, se utiliza la capacidad {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Chillido angustioso{/g}.

languages.text: Stehen vor dem Schlund Gegnern, setzt er die Fähigkeit {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Giftige Wolke{/g} ein. Wenn die Blume getötet wird oder ihre {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g} unter 75 % bzw. 40 % sinken, kommt die Fähigkeit {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Beklemmender Schrei{/g} zum Einsatz.
languages.original_text: If there are enemies in front of the maw, it uses the {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} ability. When the flower is killed, or its {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced to less than 75% and 40%, the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used.

traits.locale_text: Stehen vor dem Schlund Gegnern, setzt er die Fähigkeit {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Giftige Wolke{/g} ein. Wenn die Blume getötet wird oder ihre {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g} unter 75 % bzw. 40 % sinken, kommt die Fähigkeit {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Beklemmender Schrei{/g} zum Einsatz.

languages.text: 口の前に敵がいると、{g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}毒雲{/g}を使う。花が倒れたり、{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g}が75%、40%以下になると、{g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}圧制の叫び{/g}を使う。
languages.original_text: If there are enemies in front of the maw, it uses the {g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}Poisonous Cloud{/g} ability. When the flower is killed, or its {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced to less than 75% and 40%, the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used.

traits.locale_text: 口の前に敵がいると、{g|f:d3ccd271f5a943ccb40c541719470ad2}毒雲{/g}を使う。花が倒れたり、{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g}が75%、40%以下になると、{g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}圧制の叫び{/g}を使う。
